title: National Dosimetry Services account: Apply for services and order dosimeters - Canada.ca
content:
## Your NDS Account:  Apply for dosimetry services and order dosimeters
- Apply for dosimetry services and order dosimeters
- Manage your billing statements
- Request additional services
( Dosimetry Service Agreement - PDF link )
Complete the Dosimetry Service Agreement to:
- create a group account number with NDS
- receive your first shipment of dosimeters
Complete the Dosimetry Service Agreement to:
- create a separate group account number for your company at a different location or in another department
- add an additional product-line
Once the completed service agreement is received by NDS, please allow 5 to 10 business days for the processing and shipping of your dosimeters.
Submit your completed Dosimetry Service Agreement by:
email: nds-snd@hc-sc.gc.ca Note: The information submitted to NDS using the above email address will be processed by Computer-Talk, a third party routing application used to support the Call Centre's workflow. For information on how the third party handles your information, please visit Computer-Talk's Privacy Policy .
mail: National Dosimetry Services Health Canada 775 Brookfield Road, Address Locator 6301D Ottawa, Ontario, K1A 1C1
